zh.lifeSummary: 當John Roger Oakley於大約1465年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素時，他的父親Roger Oakley31歲，母親Margaret Blundell27歲。他於1488年與Joan Raynald在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Roger Oakley于大约1465年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素时，他的父亲Roger Oakley31岁，母亲Margaret Blundell27岁。他于1488年与Joan Raynald在英国英格兰史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1520年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Oakley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of numerous places called Oakley, Oakle, or Oakleigh, in Bedfordshire, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Suffolk, or Wiltshire. The placenames derive from Old English āc ‘oak’ + lēah ‘open woodland’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When John Roger Oakley was born about 1465, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Oakley, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Blundell, was 27. He married Joan Raynald in 1488, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1520, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

Il a épousé Joan Raynald en 1488, à Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1520, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Roger Oakleyが約1465年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアビショプ'ス カストルで生まれた時，父Roger Oakleyは31歳，母Margaret Blundellは27歳であった。1488年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアビショプ'ス カストルでJoan Raynaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Roger Oakley(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Oakley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Blundell(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 Joan Raynald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Roger Oakley родился около 1465 г. в местности бишоп'с кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Oakley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Blundell, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Raynald в 1488 г. в местности бишоп'с кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1520 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.
